## ARE Skills

The seven `okhp3-*` skills are the extractable agent logic layer of the Abrahamic Reference Engine. They are standalone Markdown files usable in any agent platform that supports skill/context injection (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex, and other compatible clients). Distributed via https://github.com/OKHP3/skillz.

| Skill | Use when... |
|-------|-------------|
| [okhp3-verse-lookup](okhp3-verse-lookup/SKILL.md) | You need to fetch a specific scripture reference from Sefaria, bible-api.com, or Quran.com |
| [okhp3-cross-tradition-compare](okhp3-cross-tradition-compare/SKILL.md) | You need to find parallel passages across two or three Abrahamic traditions on a shared theme |
| [okhp3-tradition-reference](okhp3-tradition-reference/SKILL.md) | You need authoritative metadata about a tradition's canon, translations, US share, or API provider |
| [okhp3-tradition-observance-calendar](okhp3-tradition-observance-calendar/SKILL.md) | You need observance dates, holiday descriptions, or iCalendar output |
| [okhp3-celestial-data](okhp3-celestial-data/SKILL.md) | You need local moon phase, astrological season, or Mercury status calculations |
| [okhp3-skill-cataloger](okhp3-skill-cataloger/SKILL.md) | You need to discover, validate, or catalog skills |
| [okhp3-skill-foundry](okhp3-skill-foundry/SKILL.md) | You need to create, benchmark, or improve an Agent Skill |
